name: Rajasthani Sammelan
summary: 497 cameras across 15 institutes — still running strong more than a decade after installation.
challenge: Fifteen separate educational institutes needed unified surveillance that administrators could trust for the long haul — not a system that quietly degrades after the first year.
solution: Konect designed and installed 497 cameras across all 15 institutes in 2014, then backed the deployment with an Annual Maintenance Contract and preventive maintenance schedule to keep every camera recording.
result: More than ten years on, the system is still in service with 94% uptime verified through AMC records — the clearest proof that Konect builds installations that last.
